name: draft-req
description: Draft requirement JSON from chat, grill-me answers, and read-only candidate artifacts.
auto_start_prompt: Begin executing the loaded TODO plan now. Task 1 is already in_progress — drive it to completion with real tool actions (write the req/*.json files, then re-read them), review against its criteria, then continue through the remaining tasks. Do not wait for further confirmation.

tasks.detail: Write or update only $ATLAS_PROJECT_ROOT/$ATLAS_ACTIVE_IP/req/requirements_index.json, req/obligations.json, req/contract_refs.json, and req/evidence_plan.json. Use chat/grill-me answers as authority. Existing RTL/doc/SSOT may be read-only candidate evidence only. Do not write locked_truth.md or approval_manifest.json. Do not run workflow stages, dispatch_workflow, RTL, TB, SIM, lint, or coverage. Write each file's initial skeleton early with write_file; once a skeleton exists, prefer incremental edits (replace_in_file/replace_lines) that change only the affected fields over rewriting the whole file, and reserve a full write_file for first-time creation or when the structure must be completely rebuilt.
tasks.criteria:
req/requirements_index.json exists and contains draft requirements
req/obligations.json exists and splits requirements into testable units
req/contract_refs.json exists and maps obligations to machine-checkable contract_refs
req/evidence_plan.json exists and maps contract_refs to artifact, validator, and pass_condition
All files are status draft or review_candidate, not requirements_locked
No locked_truth.md or approval_manifest.json was created
No implementation artifacts were modified

tasks.detail: Read the drafted req/*.json files and summarize counts, remaining ambiguity, and whether /finalize-req can run. Do not call the draft locked or approved.
tasks.criteria:
requirements count is reported
obligations count is reported
contract_refs count is reported
evidence_plan count is reported
Any remaining blockers are listed as draft repair items
Next action is /finalize-req only if the draft is complete enough for review
